title: PLANT DISEASES
doc_html:
CHAPTER 12.  PLANT DISEASES

PART I.  BOLL WEEVIL ERADICATION LAW

§1601.  Short title

This Part may be cited as the "Louisiana Boll Weevil Eradication Law".

Acts 1992, No. 58, §1.
